ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient (male/female) */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the patient in cm */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the patient in kg */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address for mail and location-based services */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth for more accurate age calculations */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type for medical emergencies */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies to medications or substances */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_history" (
  "medical_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Medical condition (e.g., hypertension, diabetes) */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment plan */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who diagnosed the condition */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital where the diagnosis was made */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments by the physician */,
  "follow_up_needed" INTEGER /* Indicates if follow-up is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medical_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_history_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., blood pressure, cholesterol level) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Test result value */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the test */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who ordered the test */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blood_pressure" (
  "bp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blood pressure reading */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "systolic" INTEGER /* Systolic blood pressure value */,
  "diastolic" INTEGER /* Diastolic blood pressure value */,
  "bp_date" TEXT /* Date of the blood pressure reading */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who recorded the reading */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the reading was taken */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blood_pressure_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blood_pressure_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cholesterol" (
  "cholesterol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cholesterol level */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Cholesterol level value */,
  "cholesterol_date" TEXT /* Date of the cholesterol level test */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who recorded the level */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cholesterol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cholesterol_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cholesterol_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "glucose" (
  "glucose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each glucose level */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Glucose level value */,
  "glucose_date" TEXT /* Date of the glucose level test */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who recorded the level */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("glucose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_glucose_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_glucose_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "smoking_status" (
  "smoking_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each smoking status entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "status" TEXT /* Smoking status (e.g., smoker, non-smoker) */,
  "smoking_date" TEXT /* Date of the smoking status update */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who recorded the status */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("smoking_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_smoking_status_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_smoking_status_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alcohol_consumption" (
  "alcohol_consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alcohol consumption entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of alcohol consumed */,
  "consumption_date" TEXT /* Date of the alcohol consumption update */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who recorded the consumption */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the consumption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alcohol_consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alcohol_consumption_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alcohol_consumption_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "physical_activity" (
  "physical_activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each physical activity entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of physical activity (e.g., walking, running) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the physical activity update */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who recorded the activity */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in minutes */,
  "intensity" TEXT /* Intensity level of the activity (e.g., light, moderate, vigorous) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("physical_activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_physical_activity_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_physical_activity_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cardiovascular_risk" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cardiovascular risk assessment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Cardiovascular risk level (e.g., low, high) */,
  "risk_date" TEXT /* Date of the cardiovascular risk assessment */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who assessed the risk */,
  "risk_factors" TEXT /* List of risk factors considered in the assessment */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Personalized recommendations for lifestyle changes and treatment plans */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cardiovascular_risk_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cardiovascular_risk_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home or office address */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the hospital */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level (e.g., 1 for admin, 2 for doctor, 3 for nurse) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient visit */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the patient visit */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of patient visit (e.g., consultation, follow-up) */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who conducted the visit */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the visit */,
  "visit_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the visit in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_visits_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_visits_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who prescribed the medication */,
  "prescription_date" TEXT /* Date the medication was prescribed */,
  "refills" INTEGER /* Number of refills allowed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_procedures" (
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical procedure record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "procedure_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical procedure */,
  "procedure_date" TEXT /* Date of the medical procedure */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who conducted the procedure */,
  "procedure_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the procedure in minutes */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital where the procedure was conducted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the procedure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("procedure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_procedures_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_procedures_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "data" TEXT /* Analytics data */,
  "analytics_date" TEXT /* Date of the analytics update */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who generated the analytics */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., risk assessment, trend analysis) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the analytics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
